one_time_description: New asset retirement obligation recognized under PS 3280 for asbestos abatement on housing and community buildings, increasing liabilities by $810,351
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in forestry operations (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP), property rentals (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society), and real property management in Chilliwack River Valley (Centre Creek LP). Forestry entities generated revenue of $1,067,322 and net income of $535,641 in 2023. Centre Creek generated revenue of $126,310 and net income of $30,998 in 2023.
notes: Audit is qualified due to missing budget comparison information. Large jump in revenue from $6.7M to $18.2M driven by 'Other revenue' increasing from $1.49M to $11.66M — nature of this increase is not clearly explained in the statements and may represent a significant one-time event or settlement. New PS 3280 asset retirement obligation of $810,351 recognized in 2023 for asbestos abatement, applied prospectively. Five entities accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs). No long-term debt on balance sheet. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($4,053,114) and other government transfers ($12,819,000) = $1,325,595.
